public_sources.name: ONS ASHE Table 14 2025 provisional
public_sources.use: SOC20 1137 Information technology directors median gross annual pay GBP 90,081; converted to GBP 388.28 per working day using 232 working days.
public_sources.current_readback: ONS dataset page lists the 2025 provisional edition with release date 23 October 2025 and next release to be announced.
public_sources.licence: Open Government Licence unless otherwise stated.

public_sources.name: UKRI Innovate UK costs guidance for non-academic organisations
public_sources.use: Actual-cost control for labour, project-finance category alignment, and 20 percent of labour costs overhead option.
public_sources.current_readback: Official guidance confirms the 20 percent labour-overhead option for Innovate UK applications.

public_sources.name: GOV.UK HMRC travel mileage and fuel rates
public_sources.use: 2026 to 2027 approved mileage rate for later journey-backed travel calculations; current route travel remains GBP 0 where no journey evidence exists.
public_sources.current_readback: Official rates show cars and vans at 55p per mile for the first 10,000 business miles in tax year 2026 to 2027.
public_sources.licence: Open Government Licence unless otherwise stated.

controls: Active public-data totals use the source-strict totals from the latest Aureon open-source cost book.
Unsupported reserve values are excluded from the active public-data budget basis.
Partner budgets and specialist direct costs remain zero until backed by partner evidence, supplier quotes, invoices or records.
No external send, upload, partner invite, award-term acceptance or final submission was performed.
